title: Office Bearers Felicitation & Orientation Event
description: IEEE DBIT organized the Office Bearers Felicitation & Orientation Event on 20 March 2026 to honor the contributions of the 2024–25 core team and introduce the newly appointed leadership for 2025–26. The event provided a platform for reflecting on past achievements, recognizing the efforts of outgoing members, and presenting the vision, goals, and roadmap for the upcoming year. With the presence of esteemed dignitaries and 39 attendees, the session fostered collaboration, ensured a smooth transition of responsibilities, and reinforced a shared vision for the growth of the IEEE DBIT Student Chapter.
